nodes.label: S1 Login Screen — Get In Once Then Never Again
nodes.description: Phase 1 design render for the Login screen (S1). Shows two variants: S1-a default state and S1-b error states. Session persists ~30 days making this a rare-event screen. No signup, no self-service password reset — users call the office. Branded for Ganpati Enterprises (Order capture · field sales).
variants: S1-b: States — loading, wrong credentials, deactivated

nodes.label: S1-a Login Default State
nodes.description: Default login screen with Ganpati Enterprises branding, email field, password field (with Show toggle), Keep me signed in checkbox (checked, ~30 days), Sign in button, and footer: 'Forgot password? Call the office to reset it.' 48px+ touch targets, email keyboard, no autocapitalize.

nodes.label: S1-b Login Error States
nodes.description: Three states shown: (1) SUBMIT LOADING — 'Signing in...' blue button with spinner; (2) ERROR WRONG CREDENTIALS — red banner 'Email or password is wrong. Check and try again.' with red-outlined password field; (3) ERROR ACCOUNT DEACTIVATED — red banner 'This account has been deactivated. Call the office to get back in.' Errors are plain sentences, never codes. Red appears ONLY for errors and Cancelled.

nodes.label: Session Persistence ~30 Days Design Decision
nodes.description: Design decision: session survives app/browser restarts, persists ~30 days. Login is a rare event — Raju (field rep persona) sees this screen roughly once a month. 'Keep me signed in' checkbox is checked by default.

nodes.label: No Self-Service Password Reset — Call the Office
nodes.description: Deliberate design constraint: no self-service password reset flow. Footer reads 'Forgot password? Call the office to reset it.' Admin/office handles account management. Deactivated accounts also require calling the office. No dead ends for the user.

nodes.label: Red = Errors and Cancelled Only — Color System Rule
nodes.description: Global design system rule established here: Red appears ONLY for errors and Cancelled status — nowhere else in the system. Errors are plain sentences, never error codes.

nodes.label: Ganpati Enterprises Brand Identity
nodes.description: Brand shown on login: 'GE' initials in blue square avatar, 'Ganpati Enterprises' wordmark, tagline 'Order capture · field sales'. Establishes the app is a field sales order-capture tool for a distributor named Ganpati Enterprises.

nodes.label: 48px+ Touch Target Design Constraint
nodes.description: Mobile-first design annotation: 48px+ fields and button. Email keyboard on first field. No autocapitalize. Ensures usability for field sales reps using the app on a phone.

edges.source_location: Keep me signed in checkbox — checked by default, ~30 days
footer text: Forgot password? Call the office to reset it.
deactivated error: Call the office to get back in
mobile chrome/statusbar visible in S1-a, annotation 48px+
